title: MCP Transactions and Idempotency
description: Schemas for idempotency keys, transaction lifecycle, and compensation-based rollback.

IdempotentRequest.title: Idempotent Request
IdempotentRequest.description: Any state-changing tool call can include an idempotency key. The server MUST return the same result for repeated calls with the same key.

idempotency_key.description: Client-generated unique key for this operation. Recommended format: UUID v4 or '{context}-{timestamp}-{random}'.

idempotency_ttl_seconds.description: How long the server should remember this key. Default: 24 hours.

IdempotencyResponse.title: Idempotency Response Metadata
IdempotencyResponse.description: Included in the response when an idempotency key was provided.

was_replay.description: True if this response is a replay of a previously executed operation.

original_timestamp.description: When the operation was originally executed (relevant if was_replay is true).

TransactionBegin.title: Begin Transaction
TransactionBegin.description: Opens a transaction context. Subsequent tool calls can reference this transaction ID.

timeout_seconds.description: Transaction auto-rolls-back after this many seconds without activity.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this transaction does.
examples: Create ticket, link to doc, and notify team

TransactionStep.title: Transaction Step
TransactionStep.description: A single operation within a transaction. The server registers a compensation action for rollback.

step_id.description: Unique step identifier within this transaction.

TransactionStepResult.title: Transaction Step Result
TransactionStepResult.description: Server response for a transaction step, including the registered compensation action.

compensation.description: The action the server will execute on rollback.

examples.description: Delete the ticket created in this step

reason.description: Why the transaction is being rolled back.
